## Integration Request
What system or API would you like to integrate with HumanShield?

## System/Service Details
- **Name:** [e.g., Slack, Microsoft Teams, Jira]
- **Purpose:** [e.g., Send phishing test results to Slack]
- **API Documentation:** [Link if available]

## Use Case
Describe the integration scenario:

## Expected Benefits
How would this integration improve HumanShield?

## Scope
- [ ] Notifications/Alerts
- [ ] Data export
- [ ] User management
- [ ] Reporting/Analytics
- [ ] Custom workflow automation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Compliance Requirements
Does this integration have compliance implications?
- [ ] Data residency
- [ ] Encryption
- [ ] Audit logging
- [ ] Access control
- [ ] Other: ___
